children.heading: .—Director of Cape to Develop Guidelines and Collection Method
children.label: a .—Director of Cape to Develop Guidelines and Collection Method
children.text: The Director of Cost Assessment and Program Evaluation shall, in consultation with the Under Secretary of Defense for Acquisition and Sustainment, develop policies, procedures, guidance, and a collection method to ensure that quality acquisition cost data are collected to facilitate cost estimation and comparison across acquisition programs.

children.heading: .—Applicability to Acquisition Programs in Amount Greater Than Specified Threshold
children.label: b .—Applicability to Acquisition Programs in Amount Greater Than Specified Threshold
children.text: The program manager and contracting officer for each acquisition program in an amount greater than an amount described in , in consultation with the cost estimating component of the relevant military department or Defense Agency, shall ensure that cost data are collected in accordance with the requirements of subsection (a).section 3041(c)(1) of this title

children.heading: .—Limitation on Waiver Authority
children.label: c .—Limitation on Waiver Authority
children.text: The requirement under subsection (a) may be waived only by the Director of Cost Assessment and Program Evaluation.
